baseline_solo.reasoning_summary: FTFT exhibits severe fundamental distress (negative PE, ROE, net margin -120.63%), macro headwinds (overheat regime, stress_score=2), and 60-day decline of -53%. Alternative data is absent (all adapter features missing), sentiment/ownership data unavailable, and no news catalyst within cutoff. Fundamental snapshot status is insufficient_evidence. Filing confirmation shows 8-K on 2025-02-18 but full text is stub. Information integrity assessment explicitly disallows use_as_primary_signal. Insufficient corroboration for either surge_short or quality_long sleeve. Fail-closed to no_trade pending upstream multi-agent decomposition.
suggested_improvements: Obtain PIT-safe fundamental snapshot (income, balance, cashflow) with accepted_date <= cutoff
Wire alternative_data adapters to deliver real (non-stub) features for valuation, profitability, leverage context
Retrieve ownership_positioning data (13F, Form 4) with accepted_datetime <= cutoff for institutional/insider signal
Fetch news_event_summary items with publishedDate <= cutoff to establish catalyst narrative
Invoke Agent 03 (Narrative) to assess price-gap and filing context (8-K Item 8.01)
Evaluate macro regime's equity_allocation_cap=20% constraint against portfolio construction

baseline_solo.schema_or_prompt_weakness_notes: Baseline solo agent lacks upstream specialist decomposition (Agent 02 Narrative, Agent 03 Alt-Data, Agent 04 Fundamentals, Agent 07 Risk). Single-shot synthesis of 12 evidence blocks without cross-validation creates high uncertainty when blocks are sparse or contradictory. Information_integrity_assessment explicitly disallows use_as_primary_signal in v1, forcing fail-closed stance. Narrative_price_gap_assessment status=not_evaluated (pending Agent 03 LLM reasoning). Recommend multi-agent pipeline for this ticker.
recommended_followups: Deploy multi-agent pipeline (Agent 02 → Agent 03 → Agent 04 → Agent 07 → PM) to decompose catalyst, corroboration, fundamentals, and risk in parallel
Obtain real alternative_data (not stub) for valuation_context, profitability_support, leverage_risk
Retrieve ownership_positioning (13F accepted_datetime <= cutoff) to assess institutional/insider positioning
Fetch news_event_summary items (publishedDate <= cutoff) and invoke Agent 02 Narrative for catalyst assessment
Evaluate macro regime's equity_allocation_cap=20% constraint; confirm FTFT fits within overheat discipline
Re-run decision at end-of-day or next trading day when more data (earnings, filings, news) may be available
baseline_solo.reason: Insufficient evidence across fundamental, alternative-data, and sentiment layers. Fundamental snapshot status=insufficient_evidence; alternative_data adapters missing all features; ownership_positioning not_evaluated; news_event_summary empty post-cutoff. Information_integrity_assessment explicitly disallows primary-signal use. Macro overheat regime (stress_score=2) mandates strict_quality_and_valuation_caution. Fail-closed to no_trade pending multi-agent decomposition.
risk_notes: Negative PE (-0.54), ROE (-0.16), net margin (-120.63%) indicate severe distress; however, no PIT-safe fundamental data to confirm trend
60-day return -53.02% and 5-day return -14.77% suggest downward momentum, but no catalyst narrative to explain or validate short thesis
Macro regime overheat (stress_score=2) restricts equity exposure; equity_allocation_cap=20% applies
Alternative data completely absent (all adapter features missing); cannot corroborate valuation or profitability claims
Ownership positioning not evaluated; no institutional/insider signal to support or contradict short thesis
Filing confirmation shows 8-K (2025-02-18, Item 8.01) but full text is stub; cannot assess materiality
Zero analyst coverage (fmp_sentiment: 0 ratings); no external validation of thesis
Information_integrity_assessment.use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false; pollution-defense layer not implemented in v1
Narrative_price_gap_assessment not_evaluated; Agent 03 reasoning required to assess price decline vs. catalyst
Baseline solo agent lacks decomposition; multi-agent pipeline recommended for robust decision
